responses: We provide the following courses: Computer Science Engineering, Maths and computing Engineering, Electrical Engineering, and Civil Engineering.

patterns: Who is the head of Computer Science?
Tell me the HOD of Civil Engineering
responses: The Heads of Departments are: Prof. Frank Rosenblat (Computer Science Engineering), Prof. Sanjeevan (Maths and computing Engineering), Prof. James Rodriguez (Electrical Engineering), and Prof. Toni Rudiger (Civil Engineering).
The fees per year are: Computer Science Engineering = 70,000/year, Maths and computing Engineering = 75,000/year, Electrical Engineering = 68,000/year, and Civil Engineering = 65,000/year.

patterns: How can I contact the university?
responses: You can reach out via email: Computer Science Engineering = Prof. Frank Rosenblat (hodcse@iuk.ac.in), Maths and computing Engineering = Prof. Sanjeevan (hodmce@iuk.ac.in), Electrical Engineering = Prof. James Rodriguez (hodee@iuk.ac.in), Civil Engineering = Prof. Toni Rudiger (hodce@iuk.ac.in), and Administration = Aryan Robben (admin@iuk.ac.in).
By Bus: Reach Kastovia Bus Terminal from take no. 87 bus leave at International University of Kastovia Stop.
By Air: Reach Kastovia International Airport, take taxi to University or take 212 bus leave at International University of Kastovia Stop.

patterns: Which train goes to the university?
responses: By Train: Reach Kastovia Railway Junction, take taxi to University or take 87 bus leave at International University of Kastovia Stop.
